# Rank Analyzer Pro

Rank Analyzer Pro is an app keyword rank tracking platform for mobile app teams.

Main pages:
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/aso-rank-tracker/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/google-play-keyword-rank-tracker/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/app-store-keyword-rank-tracker/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/competitor-app-keyword-tracker/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/app-keyword-tracking-tool/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/blog/
- https://rankanalyzerpro.com/blog/discover-high-potential-app-keywords/

Core use cases:
- Track App Store and Google Play keyword rankings by country
- Check specific app keyword ranks before tracking
- Monitor competitor keyword overlap and movement
- Review daily rank history and alerts
- Discover keyword opportunities worth tracking
